match.userMessage:
Steady handheld tracking shot follows Scarlett forward as she steps into the shallow shoreline wash. A small wave breaks across her ankles, white foam rushing and swirling around her bare feet with each step forward. Water splashes lightly and sand shifts beneath her toes as the wave recedes.

gentle ocean waves lapping shore, light breeze. small wave breaking and receding, water splashing around bare feet.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
